mapper.select: SELECT w.user_id, u.username, u.display_name, w.watch_type, w.created_at FROM dts_ticket_watchers w JOIN users u ON w.user_id = u.id WHERE w.ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY w.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dts_ticket_watchers (ticket_id, user_id, watch_type) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{userId}, #{watchType}) ON CONFLICT (ticket_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dts_ticket_watchers WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dts_ticket_watchers WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
